name: orchestrate
description: Runs a self-healing multi-agent pipeline (Planner → optional Designer → Coder fix loop → Tester → Reviewer → optional Handoff) with an optional plan-approval gate and a live dashboard. Invoke via /orchestrate or bash .pipeline/orchestrate.sh. Chat sessions must pass --mode chat --host-client <name> (claude|cursor|codex|gemini|antigravity) and never delegate stages to an external agent CLI. Refuses to target the orchestrator source repo (exit 3) unless --allow-self / ORCH_ALLOW_SELF=1.

task_description.description: The target requirement, issue, or feature description.
